testcase.name: test_login_returns_access_token

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: Failed to login: 429 assert 429 == 200 + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code"

testcase.error: tests/test_pr_v1_foundation_acceptance.py:41: in auth_session assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to login: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Failed to login: 429 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
